title: Flying Without Wings
why_this_song: Flying Without Wings by Westlife (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You find it in the strangest places"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You're flying without wings"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You're flying without wings"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You're flying without wings"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "One thing that makes it all complete"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And you're the place my life begins
And you'll be where it ends
Some find it sharing every morning
You'll find it in the words of others

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "find" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "find" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "flying" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "flying" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You'll find it in the words of others
To watch the sunrise on your face

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: One thing that makes it all complete
So, impossible as they may seem
And it's like flying without wings

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Flying Without Wings" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Flying Without Wings", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Flying Without Wings" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Flying Without Wings" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Flying Without Wings", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Flying Without Wings", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
